title: trifolium glomeratum
intro: Trifolium glomeratum, also known as the sticky clover or clustered clover, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Trifolium glomeratum include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various ailments.
